text.title: filesystem-as-working-memory Decision Tree
text.summary: Two decisions: per tool call (inline vs offload) and per turn (offload vs compact).

decision-tree.root-question: Did the latest tool call produce a result larger than ~2000 tokens?

branch.conclusion: Return inline envelope; no offload needed.

branch.question: Does the result fit one of the canonical taxonomy roots (search/, docs/, plan/, scratch/)?

branch.conclusion: Write to the taxonomy path; return offloaded envelope with head ≤ 800 chars.
Bucket the result under the closest existing taxonomy root (default `scratch/`); do NOT invent a new root.

branch.question: Is any inline tool output above 2K tokens still in context?

branch.conclusion: Offload the remaining blobs FIRST; do not compact yet.

text.example: q-tool-result-size → branch(true) → q-taxonomy → branch(true) → conclusion(r3-stable-taxonomy). Wrote `search/refund-policy.json`.
